docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASAAD, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, CODY AS AN INDIVIDUAL, DOING BUSINESS AS FULLSEND PRODUCTIONS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASAAD, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAKER, CODY AS AN INDIVIDUAL, DOING BUSINESS AS FULLSEND PRODUCTIONS $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,125.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (12 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ASAAD, ROBERT

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY ASAAD, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, CODY AS AN INDIVIDUAL, DOING BUSINESS AS FULLSEND PRODUCTIONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2026 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-22-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, CODY AS AN INDIVIDUAL, DOING BUSINESS AS FULLSEND PRODUCTIONS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF ROBERT ASAAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CODY BAKER IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT WAIVES THE FILING TIMELINE THE PROOF OF SERVICE. SERVICE WAS COMPLETED ON DEC-22-2025. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
